case_title: ANA SILVIA LOZANO VS. EMRAN M SHAIK

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY LOZANO, ANA SILVIA AS TO DEFENDANT SHAIK, EMRAN M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

NO APPEARANCES. SPANISH INTERPRETER MANTI HENRIQUEZ WAS PRESENT, READY TO ASSIST THE PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
